page_content:
Formerly: AMST298l.

AMST262 Houses, Schools, and Prisons in American Life (3 Credits) This interdisciplinary course explores the role of property, discipline, and punishment in American life. By exploring the ideological underpinnings in property, discipline, and punishment and their manifestations in houses, schools, and prisons we will explore how these entities reflect American society and its values.

AMST269 Special Topics in Study Abroad II (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
